codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature requirements and fulfills VAL-DFX-001 and VAL-DFX-012: compute_structural_tension now accepts injected time, no longer calls Utc::now() internally, forwards now to compute_temporal_pressure, and callers/tests were updated with a dedicated pressure-difference test.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance conflicts with this feature's requirement: AGENTS.md forbids signature-breaking API changes, but this feature explicitly requires changing a public function signature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md:6 says sd-core API must remain backward compatible with no signature-breaking changes; features.json:246 requires compute_structural_tension to accept now: DateTime<Utc>; commit 635d88e changes the signature in sd-core/src/dynamics.rs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: rust-library-worker procedure (strict RED and cargo doc verification) was not fully reflected in this worker run, suggesting procedure/practice drift.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: SKILL.md:31 requires Write Tests First (RED) and SKILL.md:75 requires cargo doc -p sd-core --no-deps; transcript skeleton for session 439b4959... states tests and implementation were done together (worker-transcripts.jsonl line 2), and handoff verification commands (handoff file lines 16-36) do not include cargo doc.

summary: Pass: no blocking issues found in commit 635d88e; required now-parameter injection and temporal-pressure forwarding behavior are correctly implemented and covered by tests.
